description_long: This is a three-seat sofa with a rectangular, boxy silhouette and a neutral beige fabric upholstery. The seat consists of three individual, plush cushions, while the backrest features three matching, slightly overstuffed cushions for support. Two large, square throw pillows in a muted greenish-blue with subtle gold patterns and one smaller, rectangular pillow with yellow and gray stripes add visual interest and comfort. The armrests are straight, flat, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a modern, streamlined appearance. The legs are short, black, and slightly tapered, positioned at each corner for stability. The overall design is simple yet elegant, suitable for both residential and public urban environments.
description: A beige, three-seat sofa with straight armrests, three seat and back cushions, and decorative throw pillows. The design is modern and streamlined, with short black legs and subtle accent pillows.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, two large greenish-blue pillows, and one small striped pillow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, straight armrest, and the arrangement of the cushions and pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, continuous back panel and the tops of the backrest cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and pillow placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, individual seat cushions and three matching loose back cushions; two large square throw pillows and one small rectangular pillow are placed on the seat.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, modern profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, black, slightly tapered legs positioned at each corner; legs are exposed and have a simple, modern style.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three segmented, loose cushions; no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid beige fabric with a subtle woven texture; throw pillows feature a striped pattern and a faint gold motif on greenish-blue fabric.
